description:
Update the provider roster in the Thunderbird Address Book based on the 'Provider Roster Update: November' email. Remove the retiring provider Robert Vance and add a new contact for Dr. Sarah Jenkins with the following details:
- First Name: Sarah
- Last Name: Jenkins
- Display Name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
- Email: s.jenkins@synthea.example.com
- Work Phone: 555-839-2011
- Title: Neurologist
